synopsis: [El-errata] ELBA-2026-50074 Oracle Linux 9 shim bug fix update
overview: Oracle Linux Bug Fix Advisory ELBA-2026-50074
description:
shim
[16.1-1.0.2.el9]
- Update shimx64.efi and shimaa64.efi v16.1 signed by Microsoft [Orabug: 38397615]
- Update vendor shim v16.1 binaries signed with Oracle Secure Boot Signing (key 2) [Orabug: 38397615]

[16.1-1.0.1.el9]
- Update shim to upstream v16.1 [Orabug: 38397615]

shim-unsigned-x64
[16.1-1.0.2.el9]
- Update SBAT_AUTOMATIC_DATE to 2021030218 [Orabug: 38397615]

[16.1-1.0.1.el9]
- Update shim to upstream v16.1 [Orabug: 38397615]
- Update Oracle sbat metadata and vendor certificates [Orabug: 38397615]
full_text:
Oracle Linux Bug Fix Advisory ELBA-2026-50074

http://linux.oracle.com/errata/ELBA-2026-50074.html

The following updated rpms for Oracle Linux 9 have been uploaded to the Unbreakable Linux Network:

x86_64:
shim-x64-16.1-1.0.2.el9.x86_64.rpm
shim-unsigned-x64-16.1-1.0.2.el9.x86_64.rpm

aarch64:
shim-aa64-16.1-1.0.2.el9.aarch64.rpm


SRPMS:
http://oss.oracle.com/ol9/SRPMS-updates/shim-16.1-1.0.2.el9.src.rpm
http://oss.oracle.com/ol9/SRPMS-updates/shim-unsigned-x64-16.1-1.0.2.el9.src.rpm



Description of changes:

shim
[16.1-1.0.2.el9]
- Update shimx64.efi and shimaa64.efi v16.1 signed by Microsoft [Orabug: 38397615]
- Update vendor shim v16.1 binaries signed with Oracle Secure Boot Signing (key 2) [Orabug: 38397615]

[16.1-1.0.1.el9]
- Update shim to upstream v16.1 [Orabug: 38397615]

shim-unsigned-x64
[16.1-1.0.2.el9]
- Update SBAT_AUTOMATIC_DATE to 2021030218 [Orabug: 38397615]

[16.1-1.0.1.el9]
- Update shim to upstream v16.1 [Orabug: 38397615]
- Update Oracle sbat metadata and vendor certificates [Orabug: 38397615]
